## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring

## Checklist
- [ ] Build passes (`swift build`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`./scripts/run-tests.sh`)
- [ ] No external dependencies added
- [ ] Public APIs have `///` doc comments
- [ ] Spec / requirement docs updated (if behavior changed)
